alternatives.name: Near-net-shape precision profiles (cold-drawn / hot-rolled) — ZOLLERN
alternatives.tradeoffs: Tooling NRE 5-15K EUR; 6-12 wk first-article lead time; min 100 kg batch; geometry fixed to 2D constant cross-section; IT8 tolerance; in-line IH available; ~20% share [SRC: JTBD_construction_machinery]

alternatives.name: Laser/plasma-cut flat plate + weld fabrication (dominant)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Multiple weld passes increase distortion risk (1.5-3 mm transverse shrinkage per pass); 40-60% material waste vs. near-net; zero tooling NRE; multi-source; ~60% share [SRC: ADJ_construction_machinery]

alternatives.name: Standard structural hollow sections (SHS/RHS from service center)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Catalog geometry only; limited cross-section optimization; standard tolerance +-1-2 mm; no IH option; fast procurement; ~15% share [SRC: JTBD_construction_machinery]

alternatives.name: Hot forgings (complex node elements)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Die NRE 50-150K EUR; 6-18 month qualification; near-net 3D geometry possible; better fatigue at dynamic joints; ~5% share [SRC: JTBD_construction_machinery]

alternatives.name: Status quo — continue machining from bar stock
alternatives.tradeoffs: Zero acquisition overhead; 40-60% material swarf waste; high machining cost per part; no geometry optimization
